Auth.signInDescription: Sign in to your organization workspace
Auth.signUpDescription: Create your account, then register your organization workspace
Auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
Auth.sessionExpiredDescription: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

RegisterOrganization.title: Register your organization
RegisterOrganization.description: Create the workspace your team will use in the organization portal.
RegisterOrganization.name: Organization name
RegisterOrganization.slugDescription: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens. This must be unique.
RegisterOrganization.invalidSlug: Use only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
RegisterOrganization.metadataPlaceholder: Optional internal notes or JSON metadata
RegisterOrganization.metadataDescription: Optional details to store with this organization.

ChooseOrganization.title: Choose an organization
ChooseOrganization.description: Select an organization to continue, or create a new one.
ChooseOrganization.empty: You don't belong to any organization yet.

Home.title: Organization Portal
Home.nextStep: Add organization-specific workflows when their scope is defined.

Profile.name: Name
Profile.avatarHint: JPEG, PNG, GIF or WebP. Max 5MB.

validation.newPasswordMin: New password must be at least 6 characters

Members.description: Manage the members of this organization
